data.title: Shopify launches an AI tool ecommerce platform update
data.description: The latest update brings enhanced reasoning capabilities, enabling Sidekick to analyze multiple data sources at once and offer strategic recommendation.

data.title: US Foods touts digital tools as key to Q1 growth
data.description: Although the company does not disclose specific digital revenue figures, executives pointed to tech-enabled services such as AI-based menu management for the company's sales increase.

data.title: Sysco pushes digital and pricing agility amid tough Q3
data.description: As more customers transition to self-service ecommerce, the company is investing in backend systems and data infrastructure.

data.title: Resideo’s ADI hits an its an ecommerce milestone in Q1
data.description: Digital adoption is helping ADI scale efficiently while improving profitability, fueled in part by higher-margin online sales and a broader push into exclusive brand offerings.

data.title: Albertsons expands B2B ecommerce platform
data.description: While Albertsons has historically focused on consumer grocery delivery, its strategic turn toward serving business buyers signals broader ambitions in the B2B fulfillment space
